summary: The diff adds a new PhotosSection and a new ProposalStep with celebratory animations and a success popup, and wires them into the existing step-based flow. However, the required static image asset files are not evidenced as added, and the proposal 'Yes' option label is not exactly 'Yes' as required (it includes an emoji).

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the uploaded images as static frontend assets under the frontend public static assets and reference them from the new photos section using stable paths (Snapchat-374559267.jpg, Snapchat-2137308291.jpg, Snapchat-1819211754.jpg).
missing_requirements.reason: PhotosSection references the expected image paths under /assets/, but the diff summary does not show the required .jpg files being added under frontend/public (or anywhere).

missing_requirements.requirement: Final proposal page/step shows two visible options labeled exactly "Yes" and "No".
missing_requirements.reason: The 'Yes' button label is "Yes 💖" instead of exactly "Yes". The 'No' label matches.

hallucinated_features.description: Rewrote/expanded the FinalGreetingCard content (new heading, paragraph text, decorative hearts block) beyond simply adding a path to the proposal step.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on adding a photo section and a final proposal step; it does not request changing the existing final greeting card copy/layout.
